title: 5. Bloodletting therapy is more effective if distal points are chosen. This conf
text:
"pricking distal points: the foot is pricked to treat diseases of the head." Similarly, diseases of the lower
part of the body is treated by pricking the upper part of the body, e.g. to treat diseases of the lower limbs,
the back is pricked.
据经验，放血仍以远处施针，作用较大．此甚合“泻络远针，头有病而脚上针”的古义，同
理下有病而上面针，所以治疗下肢病痛，我们常在背上施针
